title: Warm Homes: Local Grant: privacy notice for end-users (householders, landlords and installers)
body: "This notice applies to end-users of the Warm Homes: Local Grant (householders, landlords and installers). This notice sets out:   how we will use your personal data provided to us by local authorities and delivery partners under the Warm Homes: Local Grant the rights you have under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)   For information about how your local authority or their delivery partner process your personal data please see their privacy notice.  "
